reasoning: The Polymarket price on November 27, 2025, was 3%, implying a very low likelihood of regular US forces entering the terrestrial territory of Gaza by year-end. Searches confirm that while approximately 150-200 US troops have deployed to Israel in late 2025 to staff a Civil-Military Coordination Center for monitoring a ceasefire, the Pentagon and CENTCOM have repeatedly and explicitly denied any intent to deploy US troops into Gaza itself. As of December 7, 2025, there have been no credibly reported incursions or troop placements inside Gaza's land borders by qualifying US personnel in the active window (July-December 2025). With less than a month remaining in the year and clear stated policies against doing so, the event is extremely unlikely. Bounded by the 0.05 minimum limit per system instructions.
